text:
Pop Up Shops (ポップアップショップ) or Pop Up Stores (ポップアップストア) are stores that open at locations around the country and sell limited merchandise for a limited time only. Most Hunter × Hunter merchandise is sold and distributed at event sites, collaboration stores, in stores like JUMP SHOP and Jump Characters Store.

vision of Hunter

Vision of Hunter is a pop up shop that opened in 2025. It featured merchandise using illustrations from Madhouse.

 
Vision of Hunter Pop Up Shop Promo Visual.png
